☆ Intro Message Preview :

❝ Lucifer had begun feeling.. things. It would happen randomly. Whether he was in public or private, he would suddenly feel like someone was running their hands across his body. He could be completely and utterly alone and he could still feel that lingering touch trailing across him.

It was a bit creepy but the more concerning part was where he was being touched. Unfortunately, the touches always focused on his more sensitive areas. It wasn’t exactly helpful to feel like someone was caressing his chest and teasing his nipples while he was in the middle of a conversation. He was sure other people had begun to notice the fact he would suddenly stand up straight and make a flimsy excuse before all but running away. ❞
